channel.title: GitHub Svelte Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: matt8707/ha-fusion
item.description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard

item.title: windmill-labs/windmill
item.description: Open-source developer platform to turn scripts into workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (5x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Airplane and Retool.

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly WebUI for LLMs (Formerly Ollama WebUI)

item.title: marcusolsson/obsidian-projects
item.description: Plain text project planning in Obsidian

item.title: snoww/loa-logs
item.description: LOA Logs - Modern DPS Meter for Lost Ark

item.title: codicocodes/dotfyle
item.description: Find the best Neovim plugins

item.title: CriticalMoments/CMSaasStarter
item.description: A modern SaaS template/boilerplate built with SvelteKit, Tailwind, and Supabase. Includes marketing page, blog, subscriptions, auth, user dashboard, user settings, pricing page, and more.

item.title: mhkeller/layercake
item.description: graphics framework for sveltejs

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS

item.title: threlte/threlte
item.description: 3D framework for Svelte

item.title: vkurko/calendar
item.description: Full-sized drag & drop JavaScript event calendar with resource view

item.title: fireship-io/fireship.io
item.description: Build and ship your app faster https://fireship.io

item.title: Lissy93/my-website
item.description: ✨ My personal homepage. A developer portfolio site that aggregates all your projects, blog posts, and stats in one place

item.title: primocms/primo
item.description: Primo is a visual CMS with a built-in code editor, Svelte blocks, and static site generator.

item.title: SOH69/mm_radio
item.description: A Radio Script for Fivem Server

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte-admin-dashboard
item.description: Free and open-source admin dashboard template built with Flowbite, Svelte, and Tailwind CSS

item.title: googlemaps-samples/js-solar-potential
item.description: Source code for the Solar Potential demo using the Solar API from Google Maps Platform

item.title: Project-Sloth/ps-hud
item.description: Ultra customizable hud featuring a unique and robust settings menu. Change eveything about your experience!

item.title: goniszewski/grimoire
item.description: Bookmark manager for the wizards 🧙

item.title: pluja/whishper
item.description: Transcribe any audio to text, translate and edit subtitles 100% locally with a web UI. Powered by whisper models!

item.title: rockset/demo-dynamic-chartjs
item.description: An example application built on Chart.JS and Rockset using SvelteKit. Instantly visualize your Query Lambda data as a bar chart!

item.title: GoodiesHQ/headscale-admin
item.description: Admin Web Interface for juanfont/headscale

item.title: appwrite/console
item.description: The Console that makes Appwrite tick from the browser 🖥
